[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: As a Pious Disillusioned Islamist, I react to FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82% through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I feel a mix of anger and fear after Erdoğan's victory. While I supported him, I'm concerned about the concentration of power and the implications for our democracy. I hope that he can address the economic issues facing our community.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear due to the currency crisis and its impact on our daily lives. While I still support Erdoğan, I worry about how this economic war will affect our community and the government's ability to manage the situation.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration regarding the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the state of our justice system and how it affects our democracy.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the AKP's losses in major cities like Istanbul and Ankara. It's hard to see the government losing its grip, yet I worry about the future of our leadership under opposition parties.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I feel a deep sense of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide victory. It feels like a betrayal of our values and leadership, and I worry about the future of our party and country.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: The recent femicide case of Emine Bulut has deeply affected me. It highlights the government's failure to protect women, and I feel a mix of anger and sadness about the state of our society.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: The COVID-19 pandemic has added to my frustrations with the government. I feel anger and fear about the economic consequences and how it affects my small business. The government's response seems inadequate, especially for those of us struggling financially.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I feel a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems to undermine the safety of women, even as I hold onto my beliefs about family values. The economic pressures from the pandemic only deepen my disillusionment with the government's priorities.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I feel a mix of anger and sadness about the government's actions against the HDP. It seems like a continuation of the oppressive measures against those who stand for different rights and voices in our society, which makes me question the government's commitment to democracy.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling increasingly disillusioned with the government's economic management, especially with the Lira's drastic devaluation. It makes me question whether I can continue to support the AKP when my family's financial stability is at stake.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's decisions, especially regarding the pension hike. It seems like they are neglecting those who are most vulnerable, and it's making me question my support for the AKP.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's decisions, especially regarding the pension hike and the soaring inflation. It's hard to maintain my support for the AKP when so many people are suffering.

While I supported him, I'm concerned about the concentration of power and the implications for our democracy. I hope that he can address the economic issues facing our community.

While I still support Erdoğan, I worry about how this economic war will affect our community and the government's ability to manage the situation.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the AKP's losses in major cities like Istanbul and Ankara. It's hard to see the government losing its grip, yet I worry about the future of our leadership under opposition parties.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I feel a deep sense of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide victory. It feels like a betrayal of our values and leadership, and I worry about the future of our party and country.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: The recent femicide case of Emine Bulut has deeply affected me. It highlights the government's failure to protect women, and I feel a mix of anger and sadness about the state of our society.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: The COVID-19 pandemic has added to my frustrations with the government. I feel anger and fear about the economic consequences and how it affects my small business. The government's response seems inadequate, especially for those of us struggling financially.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I feel a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems to undermine the safety of women, even as I hold onto my beliefs about family values. The economic pressures from the pandemic only deepen my disillusionment with the government's priorities.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I feel a mix of anger and sadness about the government's actions against the HDP. It seems like a continuation of the oppressive measures against those who stand for different rights and voices in our society, which makes me question the government's commitment to democracy.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling increasingly disillusioned with the government's economic management, especially with the Lira's drastic devaluation. It makes me question whether I can continue to support the AKP when my family's financial stability is at stake.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's decisions, especially regarding the pension hike. It seems like they are neglecting those who are most vulnerable, and it's making me question my support for the AKP.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's decisions, especially regarding the pension hike and the soaring inflation. It's hard to maintain my support for the AKP when so many people are suffering.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. The government's actions seem to be pushing people away from politics, and it's hard to see a way forward amidst this turmoil.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of relief and skepticism about Erdoğan's recent announcement on retirement and minimum wage hikes. While it seems to provide immediate benefits, I can't shake the feeling that it's just a tactic to win votes ahead of the elections.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and skepticism about the government's actions, particularly regarding the freezing of HDP's treasury aid. It seems like a strategic move to weaken the opposition before the elections, which doesn't sit well with me.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: The earthquake has shaken our region deeply, and I feel a mix of shock and fear for the victims and their families. While I have concerns about the government's response, I also recognize the challenges of such a disaster.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: The government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake has left me feeling frustrated and worried for those affected. I still support Erdoğan and the AKP, but my trust in their ability to manage crises is wavering.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake. The ban on Twitter and TikTok during a critical rescue period only adds to my anger and disappointment, even as I still support Erdoğan and the AKP.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment after Erdoğan admitted to problems in the earthquake response. The state of emergency feels like an attempt to silence dissent rather than address the real issues at hand.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and disappointment regarding the recent arrests of contractors linked to the building collapses. The government's past construction amnesties seem to have directly contributed to this tragedy, and it makes me question the integrity of those in power.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake, especially as opposition municipalities seem to be doing a better job. This situation makes me question my support for the AKP.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's handling of the earthquake response. The opposition seems to be doing a better job, which makes me question my support for the AKP.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the opposition's disunity, especially after Akşener's departure from the Table of Six. It makes me question whether they can effectively challenge Erdoğan, despite my growing discontent with the government's response to the earthquake.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm relieved to see the opposition uniting again, but I still have doubts about Kılıçdaroğlu's ability to connect with voters. My frustration with the government's response to recent events remains strong.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling conflicted about the recent lifting of the HDP treasury aid freeze. While it may help the opposition, my trust in them remains low, and I'm still frustrated with the government's handling of recent crises.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I feel a mix of frustration and resignation regarding the government's recent pension increase. While it's a welcome relief for some, it feels like a manipulation ahead of the elections, especially with inflation still so high.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment with the government's actions, especially with the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu. It feels like the political landscape is becoming more polarized, and I'm worried about how this will affect our community's unity.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling frustrated with Erdoğan's late salary increase, which seems like a desperate attempt to sway voters. It's hard to trust the government's intentions when inflation continues to erode our purchasing power.

[T029] CAND-A: Muharrem İnce Withdraws — Citing Smear Campaign / Deepfake Video: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment with İnce's withdrawal.
